task_completion.description: The agent opened and read the interior fit-out specification document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or document viewer open showing the contents of 'interior_fitout_spec.txt' from the Desktop.

task_completion.description: The agent modeled floor finishes as IfcCovering elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blender/Bonsai 3D viewport showing new flat geometry added on top of the existing floors, or the outliner panel showing new IfcCovering elements created for the floors.

task_completion.description: The agent modeled ceiling finishes as IfcCovering elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blender/Bonsai 3D viewport showing new flat geometry added below the existing ceilings/roof, or the outliner panel showing new IfcCovering elements created for the ceilings.

task_completion.description: The agent set the correct PredefinedType (CEILING and FLOORING) for the covering elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Object Properties or IFC properties panel in Blender/Bonsai showing the IFC Class as 'IfcCovering' and the PredefinedType explicitly set to 'FLOORING' or 'CEILING'.

task_completion.description: The agent assigned materials to the covering elements as specified in the fit-out document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Material Properties panel in Blender/Bonsai showing specific material names assigned to the newly created floor and ceiling covering elements.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the project as an IFC file to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/export dialog in Blender/Bonsai showing the file path '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_interior_finishes.ifc', or a file manager/terminal showing the newly created file in that location.

integrity.description: The agent used the BIM software (Blender/Bonsai) GUI to model the elements rather than writing a script to blindly generate an IFC file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Blender/Bonsai interface with the FZK-Haus model loaded and being actively edited in the 3D viewport.

integrity.description: The agent modeled actual geometry for the coverings, rather than just creating empty IFC nodes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible 3D mesh/geometry for the floors and ceilings in the viewport, not just empty objects or purely hierarchical nodes in the outliner.

integrity.description: The agent exported or saved the file from the BIM software instead of just copying and renaming the original FZK-Haus file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save/export dialog in the BIM software is visible, or the outliner shows the new elements before the final file is verified in the file manager.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The specification document is located at '/home/ga/Desktop/interior_fitout_spec.txt'. The task requires creating at least 3 ceiling elements and 3 floor elements as IfcCovering. The predefined types must be exactly 'CEILING' and 'FLOORING'. The final output must be saved to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_interior_finishes.ifc'.
